prose.en: Lines of communication across the organization are established for cybersecurity risks, including risks from suppliers and other third parties
Determine how to update senior executives, directors, and management on the organization's cybersecurity posture at agreed-upon intervals

Identify how all departments across the organization - such as management, operations, internal auditors, legal, acquisition, physical security, and HR - will communicate with each other about cybersecurity risks

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.SC-01
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.SC-01
nist-withdrawal.prose: Cyber supply chain risk management processes are identified, established, assessed, managed, and agreed to by organizational stakeholders
